title: Auto Plan: prepare AgentRunRecords for assigned batch issues
description:
Create AgentRunRecords for each assigned issue in a batch.

Each run should include issue metadata, assigned agent, command, generated prompt, project path, optional worktree path, and status.
design:
- Reuse Agent Run History models where possible.
- Generate executor prompts per issue.
- Store a prepared or queued state before launch.
- Surface runs in history and batch views.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can prepare runs for all assigned batch issues.
- Each run has the correct issue ID and title.
- Each run has an assigned agent and command.
- Each run has a generated prompt.
- Runs persist after app restart.
- Runs can be opened in Agent Run Console.
- No terminal is launched automatically in this issue.
notes: This should stop at preparation so launch modes can be layered on next.

title: Auto Plan: discover newly created or updated issues after spec run
description:
After the spec agent creates or refines issues, the app should reload Beads and help the user identify which issues belong to the batch.

The app must not assume every new or updated issue is part of the batch.
design:
- Run bd list --json and bd ready --json after the planning step.
- Show likely new or updated issues without auto-selecting them.
- Persist a local BatchAgentPlan with issue plans and status.
- Keep selection separate from Beads mutation.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can reload issues after a spec run.
- App shows candidate issues for the batch.
- User can select which issues belong to the batch.
- App stores a local BatchAgentPlan.
- Batch plan persists after app restart.
- Existing issue loading still works.
notes: This is the discovery step that turns a plan run into a batch candidate list.

title: Auto Plan: assign executor agents to batch issues
description:
Allow each issue in a batch to be assigned to an executor agent profile.

This is app-local agent assignment metadata and should not be confused with Beads assignee or claim.
design:
- Add batch assignment UI.
- Show whether each profile can execute code.
- Allow a default executor plus per-issue overrides.
- Persist the mapping in batch plan state.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can assign a default executor for all batch issues.
- User can override the executor per issue.
- App prevents or warns when the selected profile cannot execute code.
- Assignments persist locally.
- Assignments do not modify Beads assignee.
notes: Executor assignment should stay local and separate from Beads ownership.

title: Auto Plan: create batch planning request UI
description:
Add a UI where the user can enter a high-level request and ask a spec agent to create or refine multiple Beads issues.

The UI should generate a spec prompt that instructs the agent to use Beads commands, not source edits, to shape the plan.
design:
- Add a Batch Planning Request screen or modal.
- Reuse the existing spec-writer style prompt generation path.
- Keep issue creation explicit and Beads-backed.
- Do not auto-run the prompt in the app itself.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can enter a high-level planning request.
- User can select a spec agent profile.
- App generates a batch planning prompt.
- Prompt instructs the spec agent to create or refine Beads issues.
- Prompt instructs the spec agent not to modify source code.
- User can copy the prompt.
- User can open terminal for the selected spec agent.
- No issues are created automatically unless the user explicitly triggers an existing BeadsService action.
notes: This is the entry point for planning, not the actual issue creation step.

title: AI Issue Detailer: turn rough ideas into structured issue drafts
description:
Add an AI-powered issue detailing flow in New Issue.

The user can enter a rough idea, then Local AI generates a structured issue draft with title, description, implementation notes, acceptance criteria, issue type, priority, labels, and split or dependency suggestions if useful.
design:
- Add an IssueDraft model if needed.
- Add AI Detail mode to the New Issue flow.
- Call LocalAIService with detailIssueFromRoughIdea.
- Show the result in the AI Suggestion Preview or a dedicated draft editor.
- Keep the final creation step explicit and Beads-backed.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can open New Issue and choose AI Detail mode.
- User can enter a rough idea.
- App generates a structured issue draft.
- Draft shows title, description, implementation notes, acceptance criteria, type, priority, and labels.
- User can edit the draft before creation.
- User can regenerate.
- User can cancel.
- User can create the issue from the draft.
- Issue creation uses bd create.
- App does not mutate Beads without confirmation.
- App handles Ollama unavailable errors gracefully.
- App handles unparseable AI output gracefully.
notes: This should help draft issue structure without creating hidden side effects.

title: AI Suggestion Preview: review local AI output before applying
description:
Add a preview UI for all local AI suggestions.

Local AI output must never be applied silently. The user must be able to review, edit, copy, regenerate, apply, or cancel.
design:
- Add a reusable AI suggestion preview modal or sheet.
- Show generated output in a readable editor.
- Provide Copy, Apply, Regenerate, and Cancel actions.
- Require explicit user confirmation for any apply action.
acceptance_criteria:
- Local AI output appears in a preview UI.
- User can copy generated output.
- User can edit generated output before applying.
- User can cancel without side effects.
- User must explicitly click Apply before the app mutates anything.
- Preview UI works even if output is plain text.
- App does not crash on long output.
notes: All local AI workflows should pass through this preview gate.

title: Local AI Service: add Ollama request layer and action router
description:
Add the local AI service layer that talks to Ollama and routes app actions to local AI prompts.

The service should use non-streaming requests first and return text responses that the app can preview before applying.
design:
- Add LocalAIProviding protocol.
- Add OllamaService.
- Use the Ollama HTTP API with /api/generate and stream: false.
- Add LocalAIAction cases for issue drafting, backlog analysis, prompt optimization, close reasons, and run summaries.
- Route actions through LocalAIService and choose fast or strong models per task.
acceptance_criteria:
- App can call OllamaService with a prompt.
- App can receive a text response.
- App handles request failures cleanly.
- LocalAIAction exists.
- LocalAIService can build prompts for supported actions.
- No source-code execution is added.
- No Beads mutation happens automatically.
notes: This is the first executable layer after settings and should stay transport-only.

title: Local AI Settings: configure Ollama provider and models
description:
Add app settings for enabling local AI assistance through Ollama.

The user should be able to configure:
- enable or disable Local AI
- provider
- base URL
- fast model
- strong model
- test connection

Default settings:
- provider: Ollama
- base URL: http://localhost:11434
- fast model: qwen2.5-coder:3b
- strong model: qwen2.5-coder:7b
design:
- Add LocalAISettings model.
- Add LocalAIProvider enum.
- Persist settings locally.
- Add a settings UI section.
- Add a test connection button that checks Ollama reachability.
- Show friendly errors when Ollama is not running.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can enable or disable Local AI.
- User can configure Ollama base URL.
- User can configure the fast model.
- User can configure the strong model.
- User can test connection to Ollama.
- Settings persist after app restart.
- App shows a clear error if Ollama is unavailable.
- Existing Beads workflow still works.
notes: Local AI is optional and should not interfere with existing Beads or executor workflows.

title: Add Launch Setup action for missing Beads worktrees
description: When a selected project or worktree is missing Beads setup, the app should offer a user-triggered Launch Setup action instead of leaving the user at a dead end. The setup flow should use the existing workspace validation/setup-hint model, open the safe terminal launcher with the relevant command hints (bd init, bd setup claude, brew install beads), and then let the user re-validate the workspace. This should work for any project, not just the current repo.
close_reason: Added Launch Setup action in WelcomeView, wired it to the safe terminal launcher, and reused workspace setup hints for generic Beads bootstrap.

title: Ignore Beads export noise in worktree runs
description: Worktree preflight should not treat passive Beads export noise as a blocking git dirty state. When bd writes .beads/issues.jsonl or related export files, creating or launching an agent run in a worktree should still succeed as long as there are no real source or project file changes. Keep the existing bd-only mutation rule and preserve issue file watching/reload behavior.
close_reason: Implemented worktree preflight filtering for passive Beads export noise while keeping real dirty files blocking; tests pass.

title: Agent Run Console v1: local prompt and run control panel
description: Add an Agent Run Console panel/drawer for the selected AgentRunRecord. This is the local/simple version of an agent console. It should not run or stream the AI agent inside the app yet. The goal is to make each vibe coding session easier to control by showing selected issue, selected agent, generated prompt, run status, project path or worktree path, terminal command, quick actions for copying prompt and opening terminal, local notes, and next-step actions like mark needs review or accepted. This version should be purely local UI + stored AgentRunRecord data. It should not embed Claude/Codex. It should not stream terminal output. It should not require a pseudo-terminal. Suggested component names: AgentRunConsoleView, AgentRunHeaderView, AgentRunPromptPreviewView, AgentRunActionsView, AgentRunNotesView. Suggested UI layout: right-side drawer or detail panel. Header: issue ID, issue title, agent name, status badge, project/worktree path. Prompt section: generated prompt preview, copy prompt button, optional edit-before-copy textarea if already supported. Actions: Open Terminal, Copy Command, Mark Needs Review, Mark Accepted, Mark Failed, Mark Abandoned. Notes: local notes textarea, save notes to AgentRunRecord. Implementation notes: Reuse existing AgentRunHistory and AgentRunRecord model. If AgentRunRecord does not yet store notes, ensure notes can be persisted. When a run is created from Implement with Selected Agent, automatically open/show the Agent Run Console for that run. The console should work for both Claude Code Executor and Codex Code Executor. If the run uses a worktree, show the worktree path. If the run uses the main project folder, show the project path. The console should be read/write only for app-local metadata such as run status and notes. Do not mutate Beads issue status automatically from this console, except through existing explicit user actions if already available. Do not close Beads issues automatically. Do not run custom arbitrary shell commands silently.
acceptance_criteria: User can open an Agent Run Console for an existing AgentRunRecord. Creating a new agent run opens the console automatically. Console shows issue ID and issue title. Console shows selected agent name and command. Console shows run status. Console shows project path or worktree path. Console shows the generated prompt. User can copy the prompt again. User can open Terminal from the console using existing safe terminal launcher rules. User can update run status manually: needsReview, accepted, failed, abandoned. User can add/edit local notes for the run. Notes persist after app restart. Console works for Claude Code Executor runs. Console works for Codex Code Executor runs. No embedded AI API is added. No live terminal streaming is added. No .beads files are edited directly.
notes:
Implemented Agent Run Console v1.

Changes:
- New AgentRunConsoleView (App/AgentRunConsoleView.swift) with sub-views: AgentRunHeaderView, AgentRunPromptPreviewView, AgentRunActionsView, AgentRunNotesView. Shows issue ID/title, agent name, status badge, project/worktree path, generated prompt, terminal command, status-action buttons (needsReview/accepted/failed/abandoned), and a notes editor with Save/Revert.
- AgentRunHistoryStore: added updateNotes(id:notes:), record(id:), latestRecord(forIssueID:). Notes-only updates preserve status and completedAt; whitespace-only notes are normalized to nil.
- AppViewModel: added activeConsoleRunID state, presentAgentRunConsole / presentLatestAgentRunConsole / dismissAgentRunConsole, updateAgentRunStatus, updateAgentRunNotes, and openTerminalForAgentRun (reuses existing TerminalLauncher). Launches via performAgentLaunch and beginWorktreeAgentLaunch now set activeConsoleRunID so the console opens automatically after Implement with Selected Agent / Run in Worktree.
- BoardView: presents the console as a sheet bound to activeConsoleRunID; only opens when a record exists.
- IssueDetailView: 'Run Console' button appears when the issue has at least one recorded run, opening the latest run.
- Tests: new AgentRunHistoryStoreTests for updateNotes and lookups. Full suite (219 tests) passes; xcodebuild app build also succeeds.

No embedded Claude/Codex API, no live streaming, no .beads file mutations. Status changes only affect the local AgentRunRecord.

title: Right-click context menu di card kanban & list
description:
Why: Action paling sering (claim, flag review, close, copy prompt) saat ini cuma ada di detail panel. Power user harus buka panel dulu sebelum bisa act. Context menu = 1 right-click + 1 pilih = 2 klik total, no panel needed.

What:
- Tambah .contextMenu modifier di IssueCardView (kanban) dan IssueListView row.
- Menu items: Claim (kalau status=open), Flag for Review (kalau status=in_progress), Close..., Copy Prompt, Copy Agent Command, Add Blocker..., Change Priority > submenu P0-P4, Change Assignee > submenu claude/codex/other/me.
- Item disabled kontekstual (Flag for Review tidak muncul untuk open/closed).
- Reuse AppViewModel.copyPrompt, presentCloseSheet, store.claim/requestHumanReview yang sudah ada.

Out of scope:
- Multi-select context menu (separate issue kalau perlu).
- Keyboard accelerator di menu item (terikat ke keyboard nav issue terpisah).
acceptance_criteria: (1) Right-click card open → menu muncul dengan minimal 5 item context-aware. (2) Klik 'Claim' → status berubah ke in_progress, kanban refresh. (3) Klik 'Close...' → buka existing CloseIssueSheet. (4) Item 'Flag for Review' hilang dari menu kalau status bukan in_progress. (5) Test IssueStore mutation paths sudah covered di baseline.
notes:
Implemented shared macOS context menus for issue cards and list rows.

Changes:
- Added reusable issue context menu actions for Claim, Flag for Review, Close..., Copy Prompt, Copy Agent Command, Add Blocker..., priority submenu, and assignee submenu.
- Centralized close and blocker sheet presentation in AppViewModel/BoardView so context-menu actions work from board surfaces.
- Added assignee support to UpdateIssueInput and BeadsService.updateIssue via --assignee.
- Kept selection, drag, reload, and detail-panel actions intact.

Verification:
- swift test
- xcodebuild -project BeadsKanbanApp.xcodeproj -scheme BeadsKanbanApp -configuration Debug build

title: Drag-and-drop card antar kolom kanban
description:
Why: Transisi status (claim, flag review, close) saat ini tersembunyi di menu/sheet — butuh 2-3 klik. Drag-drop adalah gesture paling natural di kanban dan satu klik-drag bisa replace seluruh flow context menu untuk perpindahan kolom.

What:
- Drag card dari Ready ke In Progress → trigger 'bd update --claim'.
- Drag card dari In Progress ke Review → trigger 'bd update --add-label human'.
- Drag card ke Done → buka CloseIssueSheet (require reason).
- Drag ke Blocked → noop atau toast 'add blocker via picker' (Blocked column read-only secara semantik).
- Pakai SwiftUI .onDrag/.dropDestination di KanbanBoardView.swift.
- Drop tidak boleh trigger select/open-detail (state guard).
- Visual feedback: card semi-transparent saat di-drag, target column highlight border gold.

Out of scope:
- Drag-drop reorder dalam kolom yang sama (bd tidak punya konsep order).
- Drag dari/ke List view.
acceptance_criteria: (1) Drag card dari Ready ke In Progress otomatis claim+assignee=user. (2) Drop ke Done buka close sheet, cancel batal mutate. (3) Drop ke kolom sama-status = noop tanpa error. (4) Test KanbanBoardViewTests untuk drop handler logic. (5) Visual: card opacity drop ~0.5 saat drag, target border gold.
notes:
Implemented drag-and-drop antar kolom kanban.

Files:
- NEW Sources/BeadsContract/KanbanDropResolver.swift — pure resolver (KanbanDropAction enum + action(from:to:) function)
- NEW Tests/BeadsContractTests/KanbanDropResolverTests.swift — 12 cases covering full drop matrix
- App/KanbanBoardView.swift — .draggable(issue.id) per card dengan preview opacity 0.7; .dropDestination per kolom dengan hoverTargetColumn state + gold border overlay (2px, animasi 0.12s); handleDrop dispatches ke store mutations
- App/BoardView.swift — pass onRequestClose closure ke KanbanBoardView (presents CloseIssueSheet via appVM)

Drop matrix yang aktif:
- Ready/Backlog → InProgress = store.claim()
- InProgress → Review = store.requestHumanReview() (add label human)
- InProgress/Review → Done = onRequestClose() → CloseIssueSheet
- Sisanya noop (Done→x, Blocked→x, Ready→Done, dst)

Verifikasi:
- swift test: 183/183 hijau (baseline 170 → 183, +12 cases baru + +1 yang sudah ada di baseline)
- swift build: clean
- xcodegen generate: success (file baru ter-register)
- ./run-app build: BUILD SUCCEEDED

Manual smoke pending — please verify 5 path di plan: Ready→InProgress (claim), InProgress→Review (label human), InProgress→Done (sheet muncul, cancel = no mutation), Done→InProgress (noop), Ready→Done (noop). Visual: drag preview opacity 0.7, target column gold border saat hover. Click biasa tetap select card.

Out of scope (per plan): reverse transitions (butuh removeLabel service yg belum ada), reorder dalam kolom (bd tidak punya order), drag kanban↔list, toast saat noop.

title: Phase 9: Local Persistence (Recent Projects + Preferences)
description: Implement RecentProjectsStore + PreferencesStore mirroring AgentProfileStore pattern. Auto-restore last project on launch. Wire defaults into CreateIssueSheet/CloseIssueSheet. Recent projects section in WelcomeView. Close M1 (namespace UserDefaults keys). Plan at /Users/apple/.claude/plans/tolong-pahami-project-ini-purring-squirrel.md
close_reason: Phase 9 Local Persistence selesai: RecentProjectsStore + PreferencesStore (UserDefaults JSON, @Observable), auto-restore di BeadsKanbanApp.init, Recent Projects card di WelcomeView, defaults wired ke Create+Close sheet. Bonus: tutup deferred M1 (namespace UserDefaults key di AgentProfileStore dengan migrasi legacy key).

title: Phase 6: UI minimal untuk menguji backend
description: Implement AppViewModel + BoardView (NavigationSplitView 3-pane) + 12 new files in App/ flat. Wraps existing IssueStore/AgentProfileStore/PromptGenerator backend. Closes H3 (TerminalLauncher throws) + H4 (AgentProfileStore.errorMessage). See plan at /Users/apple/.claude/plans/tolong-pahami-project-ini-purring-squirrel.md
close_reason: Phase 6 UI minimal selesai: NavigationSplitView 3-pane, list+kanban toggle, issue detail, mutation actions (Claim/Close/Reopen/Create), prompt copy, terminal launcher, debug panel. Sheet bugs (Close, Kanban width) fixed dengan distribusi sheet ke child view + explicit columnWidth.

title: Phase 5: KanbanColumn + KanbanStateMapper
description: Formalize Kanban mapping per PRD §10.5. Add KanbanColumn enum (backlog/ready/inProgress/blocked/done) and KanbanStateMapper pure function (issue + readyIDs → column). Handle unknown status: fall back to backlog with isKnownStatus flag. Refactor IssueStore computed columns to use mapper. Tests for mapper coverage + unknown status badge support.
close_reason: Phase 5 done: KanbanColumn enum + KanbanStateMapper pure function in BeadsContract. Rules: closed→done, in_progress→inProgress, blocked→blocked, in readyIDs→ready, else→backlog. Unknown status falls back to backlog with isKnownStatus flag. IssueStore refactored to use mapper + exposes unknownStatusIssueIDs/hasUnknownStatus. 11 new tests (10 mapper + 1 store). swift test: 53/53 green.

title: Phase 4: IssueStore @Observable state layer
description: Build @Observable @MainActor IssueStore wrapping BeadsService typed API. State: issues, readyIssueIDs, selectedIssue, isLoading, errorMessage, lastReloadedAt. Actions reload/select/create/claim/update/close/reopen with auto-reload after mutations. Computed kanban column properties (backlog/ready/inProgress/blocked/done) per PRD §10.5.1 mapping rules. Sort by priority then updatedAt desc. Unit tests via StubCommandRunner.
close_reason: Phase 4 done: @Observable @MainActor IssueStore with reload (parallel list+ready), select/clear, mutations (create/claim/update/close/reopen + claimSelected/closeSelected) auto-reload on success, errorMessage on failure. Kanban-mapped computed columns (backlog/ready/inProgress/blocked/done) per PRD §5.1. Sort by priority asc then updatedAt desc. 10 new tests. swift test: 42/42 green.

title: Phase 3: BeadsService typed API + mutations
description: Upgrade BeadsService from raw CommandResult to typed Swift API per PRD §10. Add read commands (listIssues/readyIssues/showIssue), mutations (create/claim/update/close/reopen), BeadsError taxonomy, CreateIssueInput/UpdateIssueInput, MockCommandRunner, and unit tests.
close_reason: Phase 3 BeadsService done: typed read API (listIssues/readyIssues/showIssue), mutations (createIssue/claimIssue/updateIssue/closeIssue/reopenIssue), BeadsError taxonomy, CreateIssueInput/UpdateIssueInput, StubCommandRunner, 15 new tests. swift test: 32/32 green.

title: Multi-select issue di kanban board untuk bulk action
description:
User mau bisa pilih beberapa issue sekaligus dan jalanin bulk action (close, claim, label, dst) tanpa harus klik satu-satu.

**Use case:**
- Pas selesai sprint, close 5 issue P3 sekaligus
- Tag 'human' ke 10 issue review sekaligus
- Claim batch ready issue ke satu assignee
- Hapus label dari banyak issue sekaligus

**Selection model (proposal):**
- Click → single select (existing)
- Cmd-click → toggle add/remove individual
- Shift-click → range select dalam kolom
- Esc → clear selection
- Cross-column selection allowed

**Bulk actions toolbar (proposal v1):**
- Muncul di atas board saat >=2 issue selected
- Tombol: Claim, Close, Mark Human Review, Clear Selection, dst
- Count badge: 'N selected'

**Visual:**
- Selected card: accent gold border + subtle background tint
- Non-selected dim sedikit saat ada selection aktif

**Out of scope v1 (defer ke follow-up):**
- Drag-rectangle selection
- Keyboard shortcuts (cmd-A select all, dst)
- Multi-select di list view (kalau ada)
- Bulk drag-drop antar kolom

**Tech approach:**
- selectedIssueIDs: Set<String> di AppViewModel atau IssueStore
- Tap gesture diperluas dengan modifier flag detection (NSEvent.modifierFlags) atau via SwiftUI Environment
- Bulk action handlers di AppViewModel (loop ke existing single-issue methods)
- IssueDetailView panel hide saat multi-select aktif (>=2), replaced dengan bulk action panel
notes: Implemented v1 multi-select on kanban: Cmd-click toggles, Shift-click range within column, Esc clears. Visual selection via existing isSelected styling. Right pane swaps to BulkActionPanel when >=2 selected (Claim All / Mark Human Review / Close All with shared reason sheet / Clear). swift test 246/246 green. xcodebuild Debug succeeded. Manual smoke test pending.

title: Refactoring sweep berkala
description: Recurring task untuk audit + refactor kode yang menumpuk: dead code, function panjang, duplikasi, naming inkonsisten, file >300 baris, deprecation warning. Dilakukan tiap 30 hari. Tujuan: jaga health codebase tanpa nunggu jadi bug.
notes:
Refactoring sweep #1 done.

**Audit (informational, full breakdown ada di /Users/apple/.claude/plans/guide-md-buat-issue-saat-ancient-rain.md):**
- Codebase secara umum sehat: zero warnings, zero dead code, zero stale/orphan bd issue
- Naming konsisten, deprecation warnings nol
- 5 candidate refactor diidentifikasi; user minta fokus 'core feature aja' → pilih satu

**Applied refactor:**
- Extract IssueDetailRecurringSection.swift (238 baris) dari IssueDetailView.swift
- IssueDetailView.swift turun dari 813 → 593 baris (-220, -27%)
- Pure view extraction, zero perubahan business logic / behavior / styling
- Section punya @State sendiri (recurringNotesDraft, recurringActionFlash) — di-private ke struct baru
- Init params: appVM (Bindable), issue (BeadIssue), isLoading (Bool) — lebih clean dibanding pass IssueStore cuma buat isLoading

**Deferred → filed as bd issues:**
- Workstation-ttn (P3): split AgentRunConsoleView.swift (824L)
- Workstation-ilg (P3): extract reusable Badge component

**Skipped (audit menyatakan tidak refactor-worthy):**
- BeadIssue manual init(from:) — manual decoder ada karena dependencies/dependents butuh permissive decode
- IssueStore mutation pattern — runMutation helper sudah dipakai konsisten

**Quality gates:**
- swift test → 246 passed
- ./run-app build → BUILD SUCCEEDED
- xcodegen generate → done, pbxproj punya entry IssueDetailRecurringSection.swift

Per konvensi recurring task: tidak bd close. User review → 'Mark Run Complete' di app, atau biarkan untuk next cycle (cadence 90 hari di sidecar).

title: Auto Plan: review batch results before closing issues
description:
Add a review step for batch-launched agent runs.

After agents finish, each run should go to review and the human decides whether to accept, fail, generate a fix prompt, close the issue manually, or leave it for later.
design:
- Use the Batch Run Console and Agent Run Console as the review surface.
- Show changed files if available.
- Allow follow-up or fix prompt generation.
- Keep closing and merging manual and explicit.
acceptance_criteria:
- Each batch run can be marked needsReview.
- User can generate a fix prompt for a run.
- User can generate a close reason for a run.
- User can close an issue manually only with explicit action.
- App does not auto-close or auto-merge.
- Review state persists.
notes: Human approval remains the gate before any final issue closure.

title: Auto Plan: show batch run overview and statuses
description:
Add a batch overview UI showing all runs created from a BatchAgentPlan.

The view should act as mission control for multiple runs while still allowing the user to open individual Agent Run Console views.
design:
- Add a BatchRunConsoleView or similar.
- Reuse AgentRunRecord statuses where possible.
- Keep the batch overview separate from the per-run console.
- Surface review status and terminal state together.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can open the batch run overview.
- User can see all issues in the batch.
- User can see the assigned agent per issue.
- User can see status per run.
- User can open the individual Agent Run Console.
- User can mark run statuses manually.
- Batch statuses persist after app restart.
- No issues are closed automatically.
notes: This should summarize the batch without replacing the per-run console.

title: Auto Plan: support Prepare Only, Launch One-by-One, and Launch All in Worktrees
description:
Add launch modes for batch agent runs.

Supported modes are Prepare Only, Launch One-by-One, and Launch All in Worktrees.
design:
- Add launch mode UI.
- Require explicit confirmation for Launch All.
- Refuse Launch All if worktrees are missing.
- Keep custom command launch paths explicit and safe.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can choose Prepare Only.
- User can choose Launch One-by-One.
- User can choose Launch All in Worktrees.
- Launch All requires worktrees.
- Launch All shows confirmation before opening terminals.
- Claude and Codex commands can launch if safe.
- Custom commands are not silently executed.
- Each launched run is reflected in Agent Run History.
- Each launched run can open Agent Run Console.
- No issue is closed automatically.
notes: This is the user-facing control surface for batch execution.

title: Auto Plan: create isolated worktrees for batch agent runs
description:
Create isolated git worktrees for each batch issue so multiple agents can run safely in parallel.

Parallel launch must require separate worktrees and the implementation must reuse the existing dirty-check and worktree support paths.
design:
- Reuse existing Dirty Check.
- Reuse existing Worktree Support.
- Generate deterministic worktree paths and branch names per issue.
- Record worktree path and branch name in BatchIssuePlan and AgentRunRecord.
- Stop or require confirmation when the tree is dirty, following current rules.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can prepare worktrees for all batch issues.
- Each issue gets a unique worktree path.
- Each issue gets a unique branch name.
- Existing paths or branches are not overwritten.
- Dirty Check runs before worktree creation.
- Worktree creation errors are shown per issue.
- Batch plan stores worktree paths.
- Existing single-issue worktree support still works.
notes: This adds the isolation layer required for parallel execution.

title: PRD Import: use Local AI to draft Beads issues from a PRD
description:
Add a PRD import assistant.

The user can paste a PRD or long feature plan and Local AI generates draft issues with epics, phase issues, sub-phase tasks, acceptance criteria, and suggested dependencies.
design:
- Add a PRD Import UI.
- Call LocalAIService with draftIssuesFromPRD.
- Present generated drafts in a reviewable list.
- Let the user approve only the drafts they want to create.
- Keep dependency suggestions preview-only until confirmed.
acceptance_criteria:
- User can paste a PRD.
- App generates draft issues.
- Draft issues include title, description, acceptance criteria, and priority or type when possible.

title: Recurring tasks: repeatable issues with completion count + history (last run, streak, cadence)
description:
## Why

Beberapa pekerjaan sifatnya repetitif dan tidak benar-benar 'selesai' saat di-close — misal: refactoring routine, dependency audit, dependency upgrade pass, security review, codebase health check, performance profiling, design system audit, dll. Saat ini sekali di-close, issue hilang dari board dan harus dibuat ulang manual setiap kali user mau ngulang. User kehilangan konteks: kapan terakhir refactor? sudah berapa kali dilakukan? berapa interval rata-rata? Hasilnya: pekerjaan repetitif jadi gampang lupa / di-skip / dikerjain terlalu sering tanpa data.

Goal: tandai issue sebagai 'recurring' supaya dia tidak hilang setelah di-close — malah reset jadi available lagi dengan history lengkap (berapa kali, terakhir kapan, gap antar run, cadence target).

## What — Scope

Inti fitur:
1. **Recurring marker** — issue bisa di-toggle 'is_recurring=true'. Disimpan di metadata bd (custom field via labels atau JSON extension).
2. **Completion history** — setiap kali issue recurring di-close, tambah entry ke history: {timestamp, closed_by, optional_notes}. Tidak hapus issue, malah reset status ke 'open' (atau 'ready') untuk run berikutnya.
3. **Counter display** — di issue card + detail view tampil: "Run #N · last 5d ago" plus icon recurring (arrow.triangle.2.circlepath).
4. **Cadence (optional)** — user bisa set target cadence (every 7d, 30d, 90d). Kalau lewat target → highlight kuning (overdue).
5. **History timeline** — di IssueDetailView, section baru 'Run History' menampilkan list semua run sebelumnya (timestamp, durasi, assignee yang close, notes per run).
6. **Filter & sort** — board sidebar filter 'Recurring only', sort by 'Most overdue', 'Recently completed', dll.

Out of scope (v1):
- Auto-create issue dari recurring template (cron-style). Cukup reset existing issue.
- Notif/reminder cadence overdue.
- Edit history entry dari UI (read-only, append-only).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Issue bisa di-mark recurring via toggle di IssueDetailView (atau context menu di Kanban card).
- [ ] Recurring marker tersimpan persistent (survive reload + sync).
- [ ] Saat issue recurring di-close: status reset ke kolom Ready (bukan Done), history bertambah 1, counter +1, last_run = now.
- [ ] Card kanban issue recurring tampil ikon `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` + counter ("#3").
- [ ] IssueDetailView punya section 'Run History' dengan minimal: tanggal, assignee, opsional notes.
- [ ] User bisa set cadence target (none/weekly/monthly/quarterly/custom days). Kalau lewat target → badge 'Overdue Nd'.
- [ ] Filter di sidebar: toggle 'Recurring only' menampilkan hanya yang recurring.
- [ ] Sort opsi: 'Most overdue' urutin berdasarkan (today - last_run) - cadence_target desc.
- [ ] Issue recurring yang di-close TIDAK ikut quick-clean / archive flow (issue tetap hidup).
- [ ] History persistent across sessions + sync via bd.
- [ ] Unit test: close recurring → status open lagi, history++ , counter++.
- [ ] Integration test: filter & sort recurring berfungsi.

## Design Notes

### Storage strategy

Beads core tidak punya konsep recurring built-in. Pilihan:
- **(A) Label-based**: pakai label `recurring` + simpan history di issue notes (append JSON block tertanda). Pro: zero schema change, langsung jalan via existing bd commands. Con: notes jadi noisy, parsing rapuh.
- **(B) Custom JSON sidecar**: simpan `recurring.json` di `.beads/recurring/<issue-id>.json` (commit ke git). Pro: clean separation. Con: butuh extra file watcher + sync logic.
- **(C) Dedicated bd extension**: kalau beads punya custom-fields API, pakai itu. Cek dulu `bd remember` atau metadata APIs.

Rekomendasi awal: **(B)** sidecar. Struktur:
```json
{
  "issueID": "Workstation-xxx",
  "isRecurring": true,
  "cadenceDays": 30,
  "history": [
    {"completedAt": "2026-05-20T10:00:00Z", "completedBy": "claude", "notes": "Found 3 dead files"}
  ]
}
```

### Code changes (estimasi)

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `Sources/BeadsContract/RecurringMetadata.swift` *(new)* | Model: `RecurringMetadata`, `RecurringHistoryEntry`, `CadenceTarget` enum |
| `Sources/BeadsWorkspace/RecurringStore.swift` *(new)* | Load/save sidecar JSON, file-watch `.beads/recurring/`, async API |
| `Sources/BeadsWorkspace/IssueStore.swift` | Inject RecurringStore, expose `isRecurring(id:)`, `recordRecurringCompletion(id:notes:)` |
| `Sources/BeadsWorkspace/IssueStore+Close.swift` (atau tempat `close` ada) | Branch: jika recurring → reset status + append history, jika tidak → flow lama |
| `App/IssueDetailView.swift` | Toggle 'Mark as Recurring' + cadence picker + 'Run History' section |
| `App/KanbanCardView.swift` (atau equiv) | Badge ikon + counter "#N" + overdue highlight |
| `App/IssueFilterBarView.swift` | Tambah filter 'Recurring only', sort opsi |
| `App/AppViewModel.swift` | Expose recurring state ke UI, action `toggleRecurring(id:)`, `setCadence(id:days:)` |
| `Tests/BeadsWorkspaceTests/RecurringStoreTests.swift` *(new)* | Tests: history append, close-recurring resets status, cadence overdue calc |

### UX detail

- **Toggle entry point**: kebab menu di header IssueDetailView → 'Make Recurring...'. Bukan tombol primary supaya gak clutter.
- **Cadence picker**: inline stepper / segmented picker (None / 7d / 30d / 90d / Custom).
- **History rendering**: timeline vertikal kompak, latest on top, max 5 visible dengan 'Show all' expand.
- **Card badge**: di kiri-bawah card, di samping difficulty dot. Ikon `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` + monospace counter.
- **Overdue color**: kalau lewat cadence → border accent jadi orange (`WorkstationTheme.orange`), badge tulis 'Overdue 5d'.

### Edge cases

- Issue recurring yang user paksa hapus → hapus sidecar JSON juga (cascade).
- Cadence diubah di tengah jalan → cadence baru berlaku untuk perhitungan overdue berikutnya, history lama tetap utuh.
- Sync conflict (dua device close issue recurring bersamaan) → history append-only, last-writer-wins di field counter, gabungkan history entries dedup by timestamp.
- Issue recurring yang punya dependencies → saat reset ke Ready, dependencies dicek ulang seperti issue baru.

## Verification Plan

1. `swift test` — RecurringStore tests + close-flow tests hijau.
2. Manual: buat issue test, mark recurring, set cadence 7d, close → cek issue balik ke Ready + history bertambah + counter 1. Set tanggal sistem maju 10 hari (atau mock date) → badge Overdue muncul.
3. Filter 'Recurring only' → hanya issue recurring tampil.
4. Sort 'Most overdue' → urutan benar.
5. Restart app → recurring state + history persist.

## Open Questions

- Beads native sudah ada konsep recurring/template? Cek `bd formula` dan `bd mol` — bisa jadi sudah ada primitive yang bisa di-reuse, hindari reinvent.
- Apakah completed_by harus assignee aktual atau user yang klik Close (bisa beda di kasus AI agent)?
- Counter reset-able? (Kalau user mau mulai dari 0 lagi setelah lifecycle berakhir.)
design: Storage via sidecar JSON di .beads/recurring/<issue-id>.json. Model di Sources/BeadsContract/RecurringMetadata.swift. Logic di Sources/BeadsWorkspace/RecurringStore.swift + IssueStore integration. UI: toggle di kebab menu IssueDetailView, badge di KanbanCard, Run History section, filter+sort di sidebar. Recurring close branch: reset ke Ready + history append, bukan archive. Cek dulu apakah bd punya recurring/formula primitive native sebelum reinvent.
acceptance_criteria: Issue bisa di-mark recurring; close recurring reset status + append history (timestamp, by, notes); card tampil ikon + counter #N; cadence target opsional dengan badge overdue; Run History section di detail; filter 'Recurring only' + sort 'Most overdue'; persist across reload + sync; unit + integration tests hijau
notes:
Implementasi recurring tasks selesai end-to-end:

**Model (Sources/BeadsContract/RecurringMetadata.swift)**
- RecurringHistoryEntry (id, completedAt, completedBy, notes)
- RecurringMetadata dengan completionCount (derived dari history.count), lastCompletedAt, overdueDays(now:), isOverdue
- CadenceTarget enum (none/weekly/monthly/quarterly)

**Store (Sources/BeadsWorkspace/RecurringStore.swift)**
- @MainActor @Observable
- Sidecar JSON di .beads/recurring/<id>.json (per-issue file)
- markRecurring, unmarkRecurring, setCadence, appendHistory, removeMetadata, load, isRecurring, metadata, recurringIDs

**UI integration**
- IssueCardView: badge recurring (purple #N counter atau orange 'Overdue Nd')
- IssueDetailView: section 'Recurring Task' lengkap — toggle, cadence chips (None/7d/30d/90d), notes input, 'Mark Run Complete' primary button, run history (max 5 visible)
- IssueFilterBarView: chip 'Recurring only' di filter popover
- AppViewModel: methods isRecurring/toggleRecurring/setCadence/completeRecurringRun + push recurringIDs ke IssueStore tiap mutation

**Filtering**
- FilterState.recurringOnly: Bool (backwards-compat lewat decodeIfPresent default false)
- IssueStore.recurringIDs (di-sync dari AppViewModel) dipakai di matchesFilters

**Tests (semua hijau, total 246 swift tests)**
- Tests/BeadsContractTests/RecurringMetadataTests.swift — 8 tests
- Tests/BeadsWorkspaceTests/RecurringStoreTests.swift — 9 tests

**Quality gates**
- swift test → 246 passed
- ./run-app build → BUILD SUCCEEDED

**Flow Mark Run Complete**
- Append history entry (completedAt=now, completedBy=issue.assignee, notes opsional)
- Hapus label 'human' kalau ada
- Reset status issue ke 'open' (bukan bd close) — issue muncul kembali di Ready

Belum dilakukan (di luar scope, bisa follow-up issue terpisah kalau perlu):
- Smoke test manual UI (butuh user)
- Filter UI lain seperti 'Overdue only'
- Notifikasi/badge level board saat ada recurring overdue

Per GUIDE.md tidak bd close — flagged 'human' untuk review user.

title: Format acceptance criteria as bullet points in spec writer prompts
description: The Spec Writer prompt should instruct agents to write acceptance criteria as bullet points instead of a paragraph, so bd issue specs are easier to read in the app and in bd output. Keep the rest of the prompt and workflow intact.
close_reason: Updated the Spec Writer prompt and regression test so acceptance criteria are written as concise bullet points instead of a paragraph.

title: Inline Run Console as panel switch + polish IssueDetailView agent row
description:
Why: Run Console saat ini muncul sebagai sheet floating di tengah layar — disruptive, nutupin board. Plus tombol-tombol di Agent section IssueDetailView (Copy Prompt / Copy Command / Run in Worktree / Run Console / Run Agent) overflow & text-wrap karena terlalu padat di panel sempit 440px.

What:
- Tambah icon toggle 'Run Console' di panelHeader IssueDetailView (sejajar Copy Prompt + Close icons). Klik → panel kanan switch jadi Agent Run Console (in-place, bukan sheet).
- Icon balik (issue / chevron-left) saat di console mode → balik ke detail.
- Buang sheet wiring activeConsoleRunID di BoardView (replace dengan inline pane switch).
- AppViewModel: tambah state detailPaneMode (.issue / .console). Auto-launch dari performAgentLaunch / beginWorktreeAgentLaunch sekarang set detailPaneMode = .console supaya panel auto-switch (UX tetap).
- Reset detailPaneMode ke .issue tiap kali selectedIssue berubah.
- AgentRunConsoleView: parameterize layout untuk fit panel 440px (kompak: hapus minWidth 560, padding lebih kecil, scroll prompt lebih pendek, hilangkan header path row tebal).
- IssueDetailView agentSection: rapihin button row pakai FlowLayout (re-use yang ada di AgentRunConsoleView) supaya gak text-wrap. Hapus tombol 'Run Console' dari sini (sudah pindah ke header).

Out of scope:
- Multi-run history navigator (cuma latest record yg muncul).
- Animation switching panel (cukup .transition basic).
notes: Done: Run Console pindah jadi icon di panel header (sejajar Copy Prompt), switch panel in-place via IssueRightPane (bukan sheet). AgentRunConsolePane disesuaikan untuk 440px panel — compact prompt preview, inline header dengan tombol back 'Issue'. agentSection di IssueDetailView dirapikan: Run Agent jadi primary button, sisanya pakai FlowHStack supaya gak text-wrap. Legacy AgentRunConsoleView + AgentRunHeaderView dihapus. 222 tests hijau, ./run-app build sukses.

title: Bypass permission prompts when launching Claude/Codex agents from terminal
description:
Why: setiap kali agent dijalankan via 'Run in Worktree' / 'Run Agent', user harus accept-accept permission prompt di terminal. Buang waktu.

What:
- Built-in AgentProfile untuk Claude pakai 'claude --dangerously-skip-permissions "{{prompt}}"' di commandArgsTemplate.
- Built-in AgentProfile untuk Codex pakai 'codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox "{{prompt}}"'.
- Berlaku untuk semua built-in profiles (executor, reviewer, tester, spec writer) yang command-nya claude/codex.
- Update test expectations di PromptGeneratorTests.

Out of scope:
- UI untuk toggle bypass flag per-profile (hard-code dulu, user yg custom profile bisa override).
- Sandbox/permission untuk agent lain (Gemini, dll).
notes:
Implemented:
- AgentProfile.builtInProfiles: semua 5 built-in (Codex Spec Writer, Claude Executor, Codex Executor, AI Reviewer, AI Tester) sekarang pakai bypass flag di commandArgsTemplate.
  - claude → 'claude --dangerously-skip-permissions "{{prompt}}"'
  - codex  → 'codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox "{{prompt}}"'
- AgentProfileStore selalu re-load built-ins dari source, jadi user yg pernah jalanin app tetap dapet flag baru tanpa reset settings.
- Test PromptGeneratorTests diperbarui:
  - generateCommandClaudeExecutor → expect prefix 'claude --dangerously-skip-permissions "'
  - generateCommandCodexExecutor → expect prefix 'codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox "'

Tests: swift test 217/217 hijau.
Build: ./run-app build → BUILD SUCCEEDED.

Catatan: custom profile user (yang bukan built-in) tidak otomatis ke-update — perlu edit manual via UI/JSON kalau mau bypass juga. Aman karena built-in tetap di-overwrite tiap load.

title: Agent Run Console v2: manual transcript and follow-up log
description: Extend Agent Run Console with a manual conversation/transcript log. This is the medium-complexity version. The app still should not embed Claude/Codex or stream output live, but the user should be able to manually paste agent outputs, summaries, review notes, and follow-up instructions into the console. This creates a persistent lightweight transcript for each AgentRunRecord. Suggested model: struct AgentRunMessage: Identifiable, Codable, Hashable { let id: UUID; let runID: UUID; let role: AgentRunMessageRole; var content: String; let createdAt: Date }
acceptance_criteria: Transcript entries can be created, edited, and deleted for a selected run. Transcript entries persist after app restart. Transcript supports role metadata for user, agent, and note/follow-up entries. Console continues to show the v1 prompt, status, actions, and notes. Transcript is manual-only: no live streaming and no embedded AI API. Transcript data is stored locally with the AgentRunRecord or adjacent local store without editing .beads files directly.
notes:
Implemented Agent Run Console v2: manual transcript and follow-up log.

Model + store:
- New AgentRunMessage (Sources/BeadsWorkspace/AgentRunMessage.swift): Identifiable/Codable/Hashable struct with id, runID, role (AgentRunMessageRole: user/agent/note), content, createdAt.
- New AgentRunTranscriptStore (Sources/BeadsWorkspace/AgentRunTranscriptStore.swift): @Observable @MainActor store persisting transcripts to Application Support/BeadsKanbanApp/agent-run-transcripts.json. API: messages(forRunID:), append(runID:role:content:), updateContent(id:content:), updateRole(id:role:), delete(id:), deleteAll(forRunID:). Blank append/edit is ignored; chronological ordering per run.

App wiring:
- AppViewModel gains agentRunTranscriptStore (defaulted in init) and exposes transcriptMessages(for:), appendTranscriptMessage, updateTranscriptMessageContent, updateTranscriptMessageRole, deleteTranscriptMessage.
- AgentRunConsoleView gains AgentRunTranscriptView (renders below the existing Notes section, keeping v1 prompt/status/actions/notes intact). Supports add (composer with role picker), edit (inline editor with Save/Cancel), delete (two-step confirm), role change menu, and copy. Empty state for runs with no entries. State resets when the active runID changes.

Tests:
- New AgentRunTranscriptStoreTests (7 cases): append/reload persistence, blank-content guard, chronological filter by runID, edit + reload, role updates, single delete, deleteAll(forRunID:).
- Full suite: 229 tests passing (up from 219).
- xcodebuild app target succeeds; new files added to BeadsKanbanApp.xcodeproj sources list.

Constraints honored: manual-only — no live streaming, no embedded AI API; no .beads file mutations; data stored adjacent to AgentRunRecord under Application Support.

title: Ignore generated workspace artifacts

close_reason: Added ignore rules for local build, cache, derived data, and tool workspace outputs.

title: Review follow-up sheet: copy prompt with extra notes for agent re-work
description:
Why: issue di kolom Review yg butuh bug-fix / hardening saat ini harus disusun manual context-nya untuk dilempar balik ke agent. Repetitif & gampang lupa nempelin context.

What:

Out of scope:

Implemented:
